===================
===================
=== Birmingham 2005.txt
===================
===================
===================
alt.binaries.sounds.lossless.bootlegs

Bob Dylan

Birmingham 2005, CC 785-786
November 18 2005, NEC Arena, Birmingham, England


Original Silver Discs --> EAC (Secure) --> Waw --> Flac Level 8 & Align
EAC Log Files, md5 Files (Flac & Waw), Artwork (Front, Back & Discs 300 dpi) Included



101 - Intro
102 - Maggie's Farm
103 - Tell Me That It Isn't True
104 - Watching The River Flow
105 - Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues
106 - Ballad Of A Thin Man
107 - Highway 61 Revisited
108 - Mr. Tambourine Man
109 - Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again
110 - Chimes Of Freedom
111 - 'Til I Fell In Love With You
112 - Visions Of Johanna
113 - Honest With Me

201 - The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll
202 - Summer Days
203 - Like A Rolling Stone
204 - All Along The Watchtower
205 - The Man In Me*
206 - Bye And Bye*
207 - Absolutely Sweet Marie*
208 - If You See Her Say Hello*
209 - I Shall Be Released*
210 - I Dreamed I Saw St. Augustine*
211 - Ballad Of Hollis Brown*
212 - Forever Young*
213 - New Morning*

* = Bonus Tracks

205 March 14 2005, Paramount Theatre, Oakland, CA, USA
206 June 21 2005, Thomas J Dodd Memorial Stadium, CT, USA
207 June 29 2005, Louisville Slugger Field, Louisville, KY, USA
208 July 08 2005, GMC Stadium, Sauget, IL, USA
209 July 16 2005, Benaroya Hall, Seattle, WA, USA
210-212 November 26 2005, The Point Theatre, Dublin, Ireland
213 November 27 2005, The Point Theatre, Dublin, Ireland 
===================
